# YouTube Shorts Auto-Sync — Source Channels
# One channel URL or handle per line
# Lines starting with # are ignored
# Supported formats:
#   https://www.youtube.com/@ChannelHandle
#   https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCxxxxxx
#   @ChannelHandle
#   UCxxxxxx


# Add more channels below:
https://www.youtube.com/@BhaktiMarg-k8j
https://www.youtube.com/@anantpremanand-o4r
https://www.youtube.com/@BhajanMarg
